title: daucus pedunculatus
intro: Daucus carota, also known as the wild carrot or daucus pedunculatus, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family Apiaceae. The plant's root, leaves, and seeds have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of daucus pedunculatus include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried root for use in various herbal preparations.
